title: Blocky 3D Pointed Dripstone
description: 3D models to replace the paper-thin pointed dripstone.
body:
## Blocky Pointed Dripstone

This resource pack gives dripstone a blocky surface that better matches its collision-box while retaining the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft. Their bases are bulkier and their tips are pointier, forming perfect cubes wherever possible.

While the hanging stalactites look very similar to the mounded stalagmites, they have been given subtle differences to represent their real counterparts. Look closely and you will find that the stalactites appear ever-so slightly pointier than the stalagmites.

_For the full blocky collection, try [Blocky Replacements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-replacements)._

### <u>Includes:</u>
☑ Proper texture-culling\
☑ No additional textures\
☑ No stretched textures\
☑ No texture fighting/z-fighting

## Showcase
![Showcase of a cluster of Blocky Pointed Dripstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EYKA1XCg/images/ef5b0a49b3fa196e0289f00a54346d11547d03da.png)
